notes: Tile id + 1 is used as the number address so zero remains a non-addressable cancellation boundary.
Structure artifacts inherit witness confidence, inside-out score, and control margin from the render world.
This file is intended as a bridge: Python validator can read it, renderer can pack it into semantic buffers.
